notes: v2-audit-fix (2026-04-20) addresses all 9 findings from external audit. CHANGES: (1) added case-automation.ts runtime consumer, wired `restrictTagCreationToAdmins` via assertCanCreateTag — closes finding #2 (silent unenforced promise); (2) tag errors now throw TRPCError(NOT_FOUND) not plain Error — finding #5; (3) updateCaseDuplicateRulesSchema gained the playbook-§6 duplicate-pair superRefine with path pointing at second offender — finding #4; (4) CaseSettingsContent widens colorToken to string and uses swatchClass(token) with slate fallback — finding #6; (5) DB CHECK constraint `case_tags_colorToken_check` applied to Supabase via migration 20260420120000 — finding #6; (6) automation toggle now sends Partial<…> not the whole object — finding #8; (7) tag update now uses `where: { id }` after findFirst tenant-scoped verification (consistent with sibling routers); (8) validator test file gained 22 new cases covering every v2 schema including duplicate-pair superRefine — finding #7; (9) router test file gained 17 new cases covering duplicateRules/requiredFields/tags/automation + FORBIDDEN/NOT_FOUND negative paths — finding #3; (10) web test file gained 15 new cases including loading/error/empty-users branches — finding #3 component coverage. REAL MEASURED COVERAGE (replaces the prior fabricated 100%/100%/100%/100% and 100%/84.44%/100%/100% claims): validator 100/100/100/100, router+automation 100/92.3/100/100, web component 93.38/70.12/93.1/95.31. Web BRANCH coverage (70.12%) is below the 80% threshold — honestly recorded as NOT MET in kpi_results. CATEGORY-2 FOLLOW-UP TASKS (finding #1): 11 of 12 CaseAutomationSetting toggles have no runtime consumer yet and are mapped to: IFC-310 (autoEscalateOverdue, worker), IFC-311 (notifyOnDeadlineApproaching, worker), IFC-312 (5 AI toggles, ai-worker); notifyOnAssignmentChange/notifyOnStatusChange/notifyOnDuplicate/preventDeleteWithOpenTasks need cases.router.ts consumer wiring — to be filed as PG-190-FU-{01..04} in Sprint_plan.csv. These were already documented in case-automation.ts comment header. FOLLOW-UP coverage: PG-190-FU-05 push web branch coverage ≥80% by adding loading-state Loading skeleton assertion, generalQuery.error-refetch interaction, autoAssignUser displayName fallback ternary, tag update-flow. CSV artifact path updated from cases/case-settings/page.tsx to cases/(list)/case-settings/page.tsx plus 6 additional tracked artifacts — finding #9. SUPERSEDED v2 scope-up (2026-04-19T23:33Z). v2 adds 4 new Prisma models (CaseDuplicateRule, CaseRequiredField, CaseTag, CaseAutomationSetting), a consolidated migration (20260419210000_case_settings_scope_up) applied to Supabase, 5 tRPC sub-routers under caseSettings (general/duplicateRules/requiredFields/tags/automation), 5 new Zod schema families in validators, and a bento grid with 9 sections reaching playbook parity with account-settings/deal-settings. File move: apps/web/src/app/cases/case-settings → apps/web/src/app/cases/(list)/case-settings so the page inherits the (list) layout's sidebar (mirrors peer settings pages). All 4 validations exit 0: typecheck (validator/api/full-scope web), tests (14 validator + 8 router + 4 smoke + 10 web = 36), lint 0 errors, build succeeds with /cases/case-settings prerendered. Spec-addendum at .specify/sprints/sprint-18/specifications/PG-190-spec-v2-scope-up.md. v1 compliance check: all 4 validations passed, all 6 gates pass, all 3 KPIs met. Replaces the prior false-COMPLETE attestation on commit 5d590a1a that shipped without the backing Prisma model / appRouter registration / page.tsx wire-up. All three defects fixed in this run. Sibling defects PG-189 (appointment-settings) and PG-187 (report-settings) had the identical defect pattern and were fixed in-scope to unblock PG-190 AC-007 web typecheck (both sibling defects were blocking full-scope typecheck on HEAD before this run). New real-path smoke test at apps/api/src/__tests__/app-router.smoke.test.ts closes the defect class for future settings-router additions. Lighthouse (AC-008) is deferred to production/preview deployment as it requires the full server with PRISMA_FIELD_ENCRYPTION_KEY and Next.js production build served on a port — not feasible in this exec environment. Prisma migrations are committed but NOT yet applied to a live DB; production release path will run pnpm db:migrate. Pre-existing lint error in apps/web/src/app/api/compliance/__tests__/compliance-api.test.ts (unused 'fs' import) was fixed to unblock AC-007 lint gate.
